prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年北京工业大学在湖北省物理类最低录取位次分别为约10528名、12196名、12077名、25224名、8880名。2024年因包含不限选科专业组导致位次大幅后移至25224名，2025年恢复为仅物化组后位次回升至8880名，近两年波动剧烈。2025年基准位次约8880名；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划2021-2025年均为7人，2026年计划扩招至11人，增幅约57%，属于显著扩招，将直接降低录取竞争强度，推动最低录取位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第65名，近年排名稳定在60-70区间，属于中上水平211院校，在北京市属高校中唯一进入211，具有一定品牌号召力；2022年及2026年声誉评价均为偏负面，主要涉及拟录取研究生发表极端言论被取消资格等师德师风事件，对报考热度有轻微负面影响；抖音热度排名第57位，评价为较热，短视频平台有一定曝光度；未见投档线断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工程获评A级，光学工程、土木工程、材料科学与工程、软件工程获评A-级，共5个A-及以上学科。招生专业中光电信息科学与工程对应光学工程A-，土木类对应土木工程A-，环境科学与工程类对应环境科学与工程A，学科实力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 通信工程、自动化等专业所属电子信息/通信、电气/自动化大类在2024年均为高热推荐，社会热度高；土木类所属土木建筑大类为明显劝退，环境类所属生化环材大类为明显劝退。湖北省物理类考生2025年约249802人，2026年估算约251181人，考生规模微增约0.55%，竞争略有加剧；2026年。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8880名、2026年扩招57%至11人、湖北省物理类考生微增约0.55%以及学校声誉偏负面等因素，扩招是推动位次后移的最主要因素，但学校211层次和北京地域吸引力对位次有一定支撑。预测2026年最低录取位次约11874名，区间11374-12374名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 光电信息科学与工程
- 通信工程
- 自动化。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 量子信息科学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 环境科学与工程类（环境工程、环境科学）
- 土木类（土木工程、建筑环境与能源应用工程、给排水科学与工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11374-12374名内，建议以二档量子信息科学为主攻方向、一档光电/通信/自动化作为冲刺、三档环境类/土木类作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如11000名以内）可重点冲刺一档专业；位次接近区间上限（12000名以外）应以三档保底为主。注意土木类和环境类社会热度偏低，但学科评估等级较高，适合对相关领域有明确兴趣的考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing University of Technology in Hubei Province Physics Category were approximately 10528, 12196, 12077, 25224, and 8880 respectively. In 2024, due to the inclusion of a subject-restriction-free major group, the ranking significantly dropped to 25224. In 2025, after reverting to only the Physics and Chemistry group, the ranking recovered to 8880, showing drastic fluctuations in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 8880. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province Physics Category was 7 students from 2021 to 2025, and it is planned to expand to 11 students in 2026, an increase of about 57%, which is a significant expansion that will directly reduce admission competition intensity and push the minimum admission ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 65th, with stable rankings in the 60-70 range in recent years, placing it among mid-to-upper level 211 universities. It is the only university among Beijing municipal universities to be included in the 211 Project, giving it a certain brand appeal. In 2022 and 2026, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to incidents such as a proposed graduate student making extreme remarks leading to disqualification, which had a slight negative impact on application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 57th, rated as relatively hot, indicating some exposure on short video platforms. No records of admission score line breaks were found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Environmental Science and Engineering was rated A-level, while Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering were rated A- level, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above. Among the enrollment majors, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering corresponds to Optical Engineering (A-), Civil Engineering category corresponds to Civil Engineering (A-), and Environmental Science and Engineering category corresponds to Environmental Science and Engineering (A), indicating strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Communication Engineering and Automation, belonging to the Electronic Information/Communication and Electrical/Automation categories, were both highly recommended in 2024 with high social popularity. The Civil Engineering category, belonging to the Civil Engineering and Architecture category, is clearly discouraged, while the Environmental category, belonging to the Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials category, is also clearly discouraged. In 2025, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hubei Province was approximately 249,802, and in 2026 it is estimated to be about 251,181, a slight increase of about 0.55%, leading to slightly intensified competition. In 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 8880, the 57% enrollment expansion to 11 students in 2026, the slight increase of about 0.55% in Hubei Province Physics Category examinees, and the somewhat negative university reputation, the enrollment expansion is the primary factor driving the ranking backward. However, the university's 211 level and Beijing's regional appeal provide some support for the ranking. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be approximately 11874, with a range of 11374 to 12374.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Communication Engineering
- Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Environmental Science and Engineering Category (Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science)
- Civil Engineering Category (Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11374-12374, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Quantum Information Science as the main target, use Tier 1 Optoelectronics/Communication/Automation as reach options, and Tier 3 Environmental/Civil Engineering as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 11000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 12000), you should prioritize Tier 3 safety options. Note that Civil Engineering and Environmental categories have low social popularity, but their discipline evaluation levels are high, making them suitable for candidates with a clear interest in related fields.
